tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
HW/Hisilicon just entered high end camera/CIS mkt. Its CS5250V200 CIS chip uses RYYB architecture for 40% improvement in night vision, 50MP, DCG & HDR.

Uses 4-in-1 stack tech & supports 4K/50FPS & 1080P 120 FPS.

Also provides S7PRO MAX camera w/ Hi3519DV500 AI ISP camera chip https://t.co/0KgXDXnPjT

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Xiaomi has launched 2nd gen Su7 @ px of 219.9k to 309.9k RMB. The 1st gen had 381k in total sales.

Uses High Voltage SiC platform for 720 to 902 km range & supports 3.5C to 5.2C charging. Max version has 835km range & allows 10-80% charging in 12 min (15min for 670 km range). https://t.co/WGJi2PhrVL

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Recent MIIT filing of EVs show much larger battery packs, longer EV ranges & lower power consumption per t than b4, especially among BYD models.

Big Tang leads way w/ 130 kWh pack & 850-950 km range (sub 5 kWh per t per 100 km).

In fact Denza D9 & Tai-7 are all large SUV/MPV https://t.co/Ke4AI63cLF

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Denza is now advertising 2nd gen D9 for both EV & PHEV. It will use Blade 2.0 battery w/ the lightning charging & much larger battery pack & range of 750 to 800 km. Significantly higher than 1st gen.

I expect the BEV/PHEV mix to tilt toward BEV now that range & charge time https://t.co/pZXADpyXbN

tweets.author: tphuang

Alibaba on its AI stack.
Zhenwu-810E is in mass production & provided for its customer usage thru Alibaba Cloud.
Its not the most capable chip, but saves on cost & has enough HBM.
Also promotes Qwen 3.5 release. Max version will come out soon.
It is also supporting multi-modal https://t.co/i1iQzmIdb9

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China's Urea capacity is 73mt & Coal represent 80% of that w/ gas the remaining. For Coal Urea, 60-75% of cost are from energy. 60% of fertilizer cost is Urea. Theoretically speaking, China can retain production by increasing coal urea utilization.

Phosphate fertilizer export is https://t.co/g9sCLBz3FP https://t.co/6WwZmFkQCn

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China will not touch SPR but commercial reserves will be draw down. We are about to find out how well they can handle huge oil shocks.

Many Coal-to-liquid/gas/ethylene glycol/aromatics project to come online everywhere like this one:

300kt coal -> 280kt hydrogenated oil of 3 https://t.co/p4q3UbPCbM https://t.co/6UPhINaWmy

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Su7 Max uses new V6s Plus motor w/ 22000 rpm & 288 kW power & supports 100-0km/h braking in just 33.3m w/ new brake system.

It uses 2200 MPa steel for strong protection & 1500 Map protection around battery.

Has 29 stowage/cabin, 105L frunk, 493L trunk & 54.6 interior stowage. https://t.co/obEPtfxuWr
